title: boehmeria caudata var. ourantha
intro: Boehmeria caudata var. ourantha, also known as Our Lady's Umbrella or Thai Nettle, is a plant species in the nettle family that is native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. It is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving joint pain, and aiding in the management of diabetes. Boehmeria caudata var. ourantha can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional Asian medicine to treat various ailments.
